packageRules.description: Pin @types/node to Node 20 LTS major — production runtime is Node 20 (Volta). Node 21+ types describe APIs that don't exist at runtime. See ADR-0050 and pnpm.overrides.
All other @types/* together (type-only updates rarely break anything)
ESLint and plugins
Anthropic SDK + AI deps — single PR щоб версії клієнта і tool-defs не дрейфували окремо (CVE 2026-04 з @anthropic-ai/sdk показав, що split-update застрягає на 3 дні)
Sentry SDKs — @sentry/node + @sentry/react + @sentry/profiling-node мають піднiматись разом (mismatch ламає trace-correlation)
OpenTelemetry SDK — пакети @opentelemetry/* мають strict cross-version contract; partial bumps падають із 'plugin not compatible'
Vitest ecosystem
Playwright (browsers + runner together)
TanStack ecosystem (Query, Router, etc.)
Radix UI primitives
Vite ecosystem
Turbo + tooling
Expo SDK pieces stay grouped — version is tied to Expo SDK release
Capacitor stays grouped
React Native + react-native-* peers
Pin Node engine — must match CI matrix
Auto-merge dev-only patch updates after CI passes
GitHub Actions: pin to commit SHA + add a comment with the version tag

Postgres + pgvector image — pin to @sha256:* digest (stack-pulse PR-37 / L10). Floating :pg16 tag silently mutates upstream and breaks reproducibility / CI ↔ local parity. Monthly cadence is enough — pgvector minor releases are infrequent, and a security advisory still lands via vulnerabilityAlerts (any time).
schedule: before 6am on the first day of the month

packageRules.description: OpenClaw runtime — weekly PR з manual review (Locked decision #2 у docs/planning/openclaw-migration-plan.md). Pinned у Dockerfile.openclaw-gateway через `npm install -g openclaw@<pin>`; auto-merge заборонено — кожен апгрейд має проходити Phase 6.5 parity-window observation.

customManagers.description: Track `openclaw@<version>` pinned globally in Dockerfile.openclaw-gateway (Locked decision #2).
